---
title: "How to Add a New Note"
date: "2026-05-05"
categories: [website, notes]
draft: false
description: "A short placeholder post showing the structure for future notes."
---

This placeholder post shows the basic structure for adding notes to the website.

To add a new post:

1. Create a folder under `notes/`, for example `notes/my-new-note/`.
2. Add an `index.qmd` file inside that folder.
3. Start the file with metadata like this:

```yaml
---
title: "My New Note"
date: "2026-05-05"
categories: [health economics, policy]
draft: false
description: "One sentence summary for listings and search engines."
---
```

Write the post below the metadata using Markdown. Set `draft: true` while working if you do not want a post to be published.
